---
title: "Team R'tistler"
sidebar: false 
---

# Welcome to the Creative Lab of R'tistler

::: {style="text-align: center; margin: 20px 0;"}
![](images/mikeoo.gif){alt="Hello Stitch" style="border-radius: 20px; border: 3px solid #fbcfe8;"}

<p style="font-weight: bold; color: #be185d; margin-top: 10px;">

Hi! 🌺

</p>
:::

# The "R'tist" Crew

-   [Eda CAN](https://github.com/edaacanlab)
-   [Başak ÖZER](https://github.com/basakozer)
-   [Cihangir Alperen TOKGÖZ](https://github.com/cihangiralperen)
-   [Ece Özlem ÖZCAN](https://github.com/eceozcann)
-   [Sena SİVRİKAYA](https://github.com/senasivrikaya)

# Our Mission: Decoding TRNC Tourism 🏝️

Between **2015 and 2024**, the TRNC tourism sector has been on a rollercoaster. Our mission is to analyze:

**The V-Shape Recovery:** How we bounced back from COVID-19.

**The Economy Filter:** How inflation and exchange rates dance with tourist numbers.

**The Infrastructure Puzzle:** Making sense of bednights and occupancy.

::: callout-tip
## Ready to see the magic?

Check out our [**Interactive Analysis**](analysis.qmd) to play with the data yourself!
:::
